title.en: FRER: Replicate, Sequence, and Eliminate — Functions, Bridges, and Stream Identity
title.zh: FRER 帧复制与消除：功能、网桥与流标识

blocks.en: Frame Replication and Elimination for Reliability (FRER) is the Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) feature that makes a data flow survive link failures by sending the same packet down two or more disjoint paths and throwing away the duplicates at the far end. Clause 7.1.1 lists its goals: cut packet-loss rates by replication; work for unicast or multicast; support both intermittent Streams (at most one extra packet in flight on one path) and bulk Streams (many extra in flight); detect latent errors (a silent path failure that a healthy second path would otherwise mask); and be easy to use without per-Stream configuration in every relay. In-order delivery is explicitly NOT a goal — merging paths of different lengths can reorder packets.
blocks.zh: 帧复制与消除以提高可靠性（FRER, Frame Replication and Elimination for Reliability）是时间敏感网络（TSN, Time-Sensitive Networking）的一项功能：把同一个数据包沿两条或多条互不相交的路径发送，并在终点丢弃重复包，从而让数据流能够在链路故障时存活。Clause 7.1.1 列出了它的目标：通过复制降低丢包率；支持单播或组播；既支持间歇流（任一路径上在途包至多多出一个）也支持批量流（在途包可多出很多）；检测潜伏错误（一条路径静默失效，而健康的第二条路径会把它掩盖掉）；并且易于使用，无需在每个中继上做逐流配置。值得注意的是，按序交付明确不是目标——合并长度不同的路径会导致乱序。

blocks.en: Vocabulary that runs through the whole clause: a Compound Stream is the full end-to-end flow; it is carried by two or more Member Streams, each one a copy travelling its own path. A stream_handle is the internal label that names a Stream inside one system, and a sequence_number is the per-packet counter used to spot duplicates. Clause 7.2 clarifies that this stream_handle is purely internal — distinct from the StreamID that IEEE 802.1Q uses for bandwidth reservations.
blocks.zh: 贯穿整个 Clause 的术语：复合流（Compound Stream）是完整的端到端数据流；它由两条或多条成员流（Member Stream）承载，每条成员流是沿各自路径传输的一份拷贝。stream_handle 是系统内部用来命名某条流的标签，sequence_number 是逐包计数器，用于识别重复包。Clause 7.2 澄清：这个 stream_handle 纯属内部使用——与 IEEE 802.1Q 用于带宽预留的 StreamID 不同。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  T[Talker] --> G[Sequence generation]
  G --> S[Stream splitting]
  S --> M1[Member Stream 1]
  S --> M2[Member Stream 2]
  M1 --> R[Sequence recovery]
  M2 --> R
  R --> L[Listener]
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  T[发送方] --> G[序列生成]
  G --> S[流拆分]
  S --> M1[成员流 1]
  S --> M2[成员流 2]
  M1 --> R[序列恢复]
  M2 --> R
  R --> L[接收方]

blocks.en: Clause 7.3 names the five FRER functions, each living at a defined point in the protocol stack. (1) Sequencing (7.4) stamps a sequence_number on outgoing packets and discards inbound duplicates. (2) Stream splitting (7.7) clones each packet, giving each copy a different stream_handle — this is what creates Member Streams. (3) Individual recovery (7.5) discards duplicates on a single Member Stream. (4) Sequence encode/decode (7.6) writes the sequence_number into the actual frame (e.g. as an R-TAG) and reads it back out. (5) Stream identification (Clause 6) derives the stream_handle from a received frame. Not every stack needs all five.
blocks.zh: Clause 7.3 命名了五个 FRER 功能，每个都位于协议栈中明确的位置。(1) 序列功能（Sequencing, 7.4）为出向包打上 sequence_number，并丢弃入向重复包。(2) 流拆分（Stream splitting, 7.7）克隆每个包，给每份拷贝不同的 stream_handle——这正是成员流的产生方式。(3) 单流恢复（Individual recovery, 7.5）在单条成员流上丢弃重复包。(4) 序列编解码（Sequence encode/decode, 7.6）把 sequence_number 写入真实帧（例如作为 R-TAG）并再读回。(5) 流标识（Stream identification, Clause 6）从收到的帧中推导出 stream_handle。并非每个协议栈都需要全部五个功能。

blocks.en: The Sequencing function (7.4) has two halves. The Sequence generation function (7.4.1) keeps a counter GenSeqNum (range 0..65535, since the constant GenSeqSpace is 65 536); each DATA_REQUEST event runs SequenceGenerationAlgorithm, which copies the counter into the packet's sequence_number and increments it, wrapping past 65535 back to 0; a BEGIN reset runs SequenceGenerationReset to zero it. The Sequence recovery function (7.4.2) merges all Member Streams of one Compound Stream and discards duplicates. It is built from a Base recovery function (7.4.3) — the shared engine, with state variables like RecovSeqSpace (also 65 536), SequenceHistory (a sliding window) and RecovSeqNum — driven by either the VectorRecoveryAlgorithm (a window that tolerates bulk-stream gaps) or the simpler MatchRecoveryAlgorithm (for intermittent Streams). A RECOVERY_TIMEOUT resets it so a long silence doesn't strand the window.
blocks.zh: 序列功能（7.4）有两个部分。序列生成功能（Sequence generation, 7.4.1）维护一个计数器 GenSeqNum（范围 0..65535，因为常量 GenSeqSpace 为 65 536）；每个 DATA_REQUEST 事件触发 SequenceGenerationAlgorithm，它把计数器值复制到包的 sequence_number 中并递增，超过 65535 后回绕到 0；BEGIN 复位会触发 SequenceGenerationReset 将其清零。序列恢复功能（Sequence recovery, 7.4.2）合并同一复合流的所有成员流并丢弃重复包。它由基础恢复功能（Base recovery, 7.4.3）构建——这是共享引擎，带有 RecovSeqSpace（同为 65 536）、SequenceHistory（滑动窗口）和 RecovSeqNum 等状态变量——由向量恢复算法（VectorRecoveryAlgorithm，容忍批量流间隙的窗口）或更简单的匹配恢复算法（MatchRecoveryAlgorithm，用于间歇流）驱动。RECOVERY_TIMEOUT 会复位它，使长时间静默不会让窗口卡死。

blocks.en: Clause 7.4.4 adds the Latent error detection function — the answer to the problem that, with redundancy working, a silently failed path produces no visible loss. Its insight: in a healthy Compound Stream with n paths, the recovery function should discard about (n−1) packets for every one it passes. A timer-driven LatentErrorTest compares the running difference (CurBaseDifference) of passed vs. discarded counts against a threshold; if reality drifts too far, it raises SIGNAL_LATENT_ERROR. A second timer (LatentErrorReset) periodically rebases the counters so random one-off losses don't accumulate. Individual recovery (7.5) complements it: by stripping repeated sequence numbers from a stuck transmitter before merging, it stops a babbling path from polluting the merged Stream.
blocks.zh: Clause 7.4.4 增加了潜伏错误检测功能（Latent error detection）——它解决的问题是：当冗余正常工作时，一条静默失效的路径不会产生可见丢包。其核心思想是：在一条健康的、具有 n 条路径的复合流中，恢复功能每通过一个包，应丢弃约 (n−1) 个包。由定时器驱动的 LatentErrorTest 把通过数与丢弃数的运行差值（CurBaseDifference）与阈值比较；若实际值偏离过大，就触发 SIGNAL_LATENT_ERROR。第二个定时器（LatentErrorReset）周期性地重置计数基准，使偶发的一次性丢包不会累积。单流恢复（7.5）对它形成补充：在合并前剥除卡死发送器重复的序列号，防止某条乱说话的路径污染合并后的流。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 520 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="5" y="20" width="110" height="30"/><text x="60" y="39" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Dest MAC (6)</text><rect x="115" y="20" width="110" height="30"/><text x="170" y="39" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Src MAC (6)</text><rect x="225" y="20" width="80" height="30"/><text x="265" y="39" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">C-TAG (4)</text><rect x="305" y="20" width="70" height="30"/><text x="340" y="35" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">R-TAG ET</text><text x="340" y="46" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">F1-C1 (2)</text><rect x="375" y="20" width="50" height="30"/><text x="400" y="35" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Resv (2)</text><text x="400" y="46" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Seq (2)</text><rect x="425" y="20" width="90" height="30"/><text x="470" y="39" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Type + Data</text><text x="5" y="14" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">An Ethernet frame carrying a C-VLAN tag and an R-TAG (octet counts in parentheses)</text></svg>

caption.en: Clause 7.8 / 8.3: the Redundancy tag (R-TAG) sits after any C-VLAN tag. Its EtherType is F1-C1 (Table 7-1), followed by a 16-bit Reserved field (sent as zeros) and the 16-bit Sequence Number, adding 6 octets. The HSR sequence tag (7.9) and PRP sequence trailer (7.10) are alternative 6-octet encodings, the PRP one appended at the frame's tail.
caption.zh: Clause 7.8 / 8.3：冗余标签（R-TAG）位于任何 C-VLAN 标签之后。其以太类型为 F1-C1（表 7-1），后跟 16 位保留字段（发送时置零）和 16 位序列号，共增加 6 个八位字节。HSR 序列标签（7.9）与 PRP 序列尾标（7.10）是另外两种 6 字节编码方式，其中 PRP 的那种附加在帧的尾部。

blocks.en: Clause 7.6 introduces the Sequence encode/decode function, whose job is to physically carry the sequence_number in the frame. The only mandatory format is the Redundancy tag (R-TAG, 7.8): on send it copies the low 16 bits of sequence_number into the Sequence Number field, zeroes the Reserved field, and inserts the R-TAG EtherType F1-C1 (7.8.1) plus the 4-byte R-TAG information (7.8.2); on receive it strips those 6 octets back off, or marks the sequence_number invalid if the tag is missing. Two optional formats interoperate with pre-existing protocols: the HSR sequence tag (7.9, High-availability Seamless Redundancy, defined by IEC 62439-3, carrying a PathId) and the PRP sequence trailer (7.10, Parallel Redundancy Protocol, appended at the frame tail and carrying a LanId). FRER can translate between all three.
blocks.zh: Clause 7.6 引入序列编解码功能（Sequence encode/decode），其职责是把 sequence_number 实际承载在帧中。唯一强制的格式是冗余标签（R-TAG, 7.8）：发送时把 sequence_number 的低 16 位复制到序列号字段、将保留字段置零，并插入 R-TAG 以太类型 F1-C1（7.8.1）以及 4 字节的 R-TAG 信息（7.8.2）；接收时剥除这 6 个八位字节，若标签缺失则将 sequence_number 标记为无效。两种可选格式用于与已有协议互通：HSR 序列标签（7.9，高可用无缝冗余 High-availability Seamless Redundancy，由 IEC 62439-3 定义，携带 PathId）以及 PRP 序列尾标（7.10，并行冗余协议 Parallel Redundancy Protocol，附加在帧尾并携带 LanId）。FRER 可在这三者之间转换。

blocks.en: Clause 8 brings FRER down to a real IEEE 802.1Q Bridge. Rather than allowing the full freedom of Clause 7, Clause 8.1 limits a Bridge to two stages: Input transformations (an expanded ingress port doing Sequence generation and active Stream identification, letting the Bridge proxy for FRER-unaware Talkers) and Augmented forwarding (the normal 802.1Q forwarding process, enriched with recovery, encode/decode and identification). Clause 8.2 details those input transformations — identify the Stream, generate a sequence number, encode an R-TAG, and assign a unique {VLAN, destination MAC} pair. Clause 8.3 shows where the R-TAG sits relative to a C-VLAN tag (the figure above). Clause 8.4 lists which managed objects an FRER C-component must implement, with constraints in Table 8-1 — e.g. sequence generation must be in-facing (numbers added only on the way in), and recovery must be in-facing (duplicates dropped only on the way out).
blocks.zh: Clause 8 把 FRER 落实到真实的 IEEE 802.1Q 网桥上。它不再允许 Clause 7 那样的完全自由，Clause 8.1 把网桥限制为两个阶段：输入变换（Input transformations，一个扩展的入口端口做序列生成与主动流标识，使网桥能为不支持 FRER 的发送方做代理）和增强转发（Augmented forwarding，即常规 802.1Q 转发过程，叠加恢复、编解码与标识功能）。Clause 8.2 详述这些输入变换——识别流、生成序列号、编码 R-TAG，并分配唯一的 {VLAN, 目的 MAC} 对。Clause 8.3 给出 R-TAG 相对于 C-VLAN 标签的位置（见上图）。Clause 8.4 列出 FRER C 组件必须实现哪些受管对象，并在表 8-1 中给出约束——例如序列生成必须为内向（in-facing，只在进入方向添加序列号），恢复必须为内向（重复包只在离开方向丢弃）。

blocks.en: Clause 9 is the Stream Identification Management model — the table that turns an arriving frame into a stream_handle. Clause 9.1 defines the Stream identity table as a set of tsnStreamIdEntry objects (9.1.1), each carrying a tsnStreamIdHandle (9.1.1.1, the handle this entry controls), four port lists for where to place identification functions (in/out-facing × output/input direction, 9.1.1.2–9.1.1.5), a tsnStreamIdIdentificationType (9.1.1.6, an OUI-tagged enum from Table 9-1) and tsnStreamIdParameters (9.1.1.7). The parameters block is filled by one of four method-specific object sets: Null Stream identification (9.1.2, match by destination MAC + VLAN), Source MAC and VLAN identification (9.1.3), Active Destination MAC and VLAN identification (9.1.4, which can also rewrite the destination MAC/VLAN/priority on the way up or down), and IP Stream identification (9.1.5, matching IP source/destination, DSCP, next protocol and TCP/UDP ports).
blocks.zh: Clause 9 是流标识管理模型——把到达的帧转换成 stream_handle 的那张表。Clause 9.1 把流标识表（Stream identity table）定义为一组 tsnStreamIdEntry 对象（9.1.1），每个都带有：tsnStreamIdHandle（9.1.1.1，本条目控制的句柄）、四个端口列表用于指明在何处放置标识功能（内向/外向 × 输出/输入方向，9.1.1.2–9.1.1.5）、tsnStreamIdIdentificationType（9.1.1.6，来自表 9-1 的带 OUI 标记的枚举值）以及 tsnStreamIdParameters（9.1.1.7）。参数块由四种方法特定的对象集之一填充：空流标识（Null, 9.1.2，按目的 MAC + VLAN 匹配）、源 MAC 与 VLAN 标识（9.1.3）、主动目的 MAC 与 VLAN 标识（9.1.4，还可在上行或下行方向改写目的 MAC/VLAN/优先级）、以及 IP 流标识（9.1.5，匹配 IP 源/目的地址、DSCP、下一协议及 TCP/UDP 端口）。

blocks.en: Clauses 9.2 and 9.3 close the loop with counters so management can see how identification is performing. Per-port-per-Stream counters (9.2), indexed by port, facing, and stream_handle, are tsnCpsSidInputPackets (9.2.1, each packet the function identifies) and tsnCpsSidOutputPackets (9.2.2, each packet it passes down the stack). The per-port totals (9.3) — tsnCpSidInputPackets (9.3.1) and tsnCpSidOutputPackets (9.3.2) — are simply the sums over all Streams on that port. On links faster than 650 Mbit/s these counters must be 64 bits so they don't wrap too quickly.
blocks.zh: Clause 9.2 与 9.3 用计数器闭合整个流程，让管理实体看到标识的运行情况。逐端口逐流计数器（9.2）按端口、朝向和 stream_handle 索引，包括 tsnCpsSidInputPackets（9.2.1，每个被该功能标识的包）和 tsnCpsSidOutputPackets（9.2.2，每个被它向下传递的包）。逐端口汇总计数器（9.3）——tsnCpSidInputPackets（9.3.1）和 tsnCpSidOutputPackets（9.3.2）——就是该端口上所有流的对应计数之和。在速率高于 650 Mbit/s 的链路上，这些计数器必须为 64 位，以免回绕过快。

summary.en: Coverage map — every clause this lesson teaches, by number
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——本课讲解的每个条款（按编号）

blocks.en:
Clause 7 — FRER: 7.1.1 goals/objectives (replication, multicast, intermittent vs. bulk Streams, latent-error detection, ease of use; in-order delivery explicitly out of scope). 7.2 use of the term Stream (Member vs. Compound; internal stream_handle vs. 802.1Q StreamID). 7.3 the five functions and where they sit. Sequencing (7.4): 7.4.1 sequence generation (GenSeqNum, GenSeqSpace=65536, the SequenceGenerationReset and SequenceGenerationAlgorithm routines, DATA_REQUEST/SEND_DATA events); 7.4.2 sequence recovery (merges Member Streams, built on the Base recovery function); 7.4.3 base recovery (RecovSeqSpace, SequenceHistory, RecovSeqNum, RemainingTicks, TakeAny; VectorRecoveryAlgorithm for bulk, MatchRecoveryAlgorithm for intermittent, ShiftSequenceHistory; RECOVERY_TIMEOUT); 7.4.4 latent error detection (n−1 discards expected per pass, CurBaseDifference, LatentErrorReset, LatentErrorTest, SIGNAL_LATENT_ERROR). 7.5 individual recovery (single Member Stream, defeats a stuck transmitter, no latent-error sub-function). 7.6 sequence encode/decode (writes/reads the sequence_number; needed unless Stream identification already encodes it). 7.7 stream splitting (clones packets via the Stream split table, each copy a new stream_handle). 7.8 redundancy tag: 7.8.1 R-TAG EtherType (F1-C1, Table 7-1); 7.8.2 R-TAG information (16-bit Reserved + 16-bit Sequence Number). 7.9 HSR sequence tag (IEC 62439-3, PathId). 7.10 PRP sequence trailer (IEC 62439-3, LanId, appended at tail). Autoconfiguration: 7.11.1 introduction (explicit vs. auto via the Sequence/Output autoconfiguration tables; only works with Source-MAC-and-VLAN identification + MatchRecoveryAlgorithm); 7.11.2 creating autoconfigured Stream identity table entries (the match conditions and the cascade that builds tsnStreamIdEntry, Sequence recovery, and Sequence identification entries, including discovering Member Streams of a Compound Stream and a destruct timer).

Clause 8 — FRER in Bridges: 8.1 limiting options (the two stages — Input transformations and Augmented forwarding — instead of Clause 7's full freedom). 8.2 FRER C-component input transformations (identify → sequence-generate → R-TAG → unique {VLAN, dest MAC}). 8.3 FRER and VLAN tags (R-TAG placement after a C-VLAN tag; the example frame format). 8.4 configuring FRER in Bridges (which Clause 9/10 managed objects an FRER C-component implements; Table 8-1 limitations: in-facing generation/recovery, out-facing encode).

Clause 9 — Stream Identification Management: 9.1 Stream identity table; 9.1.1 tsnStreamIdEntry (handle, four port lists, identification type, parameters); 9.1.2 Null Stream identification objects; 9.1.3 Source MAC and VLAN objects; 9.1.4 Active Destination MAC and VLAN objects (down/up MAC, VLAN, priority, tagged); 9.1.5 IP Stream identification objects (dest MAC, IP source/dest, DSCP, next protocol, source/dest port). 9.2 per-port per-Stream counters: 9.2.1 tsnCpsSidInputPackets, 9.2.2 tsnCpsSidOutputPackets. 9.3 per-port counters: 9.3.1 tsnCpSidInputPackets, 9.3.2 tsnCpSidOutputPackets (sums over all Streams on the port).
blocks.zh:
Clause 7 — FRER：7.1.1 目标与宗旨（复制、组播、间歇流与批量流之分、潜伏错误检测、易用性；按序交付明确不在范围内）。7.2 关于“流”一词的用法（成员流与复合流；内部 stream_handle 与 802.1Q StreamID 之别）。7.3 五个功能及其位置。序列功能（7.4）：7.4.1 序列生成（GenSeqNum、GenSeqSpace=65536、SequenceGenerationReset 与 SequenceGenerationAlgorithm 例程、DATA_REQUEST/SEND_DATA 事件）；7.4.2 序列恢复（合并成员流，基于基础恢复功能）；7.4.3 基础恢复（RecovSeqSpace、SequenceHistory、RecovSeqNum、RemainingTicks、TakeAny；用于批量流的 VectorRecoveryAlgorithm、用于间歇流的 MatchRecoveryAlgorithm、ShiftSequenceHistory；RECOVERY_TIMEOUT）；7.4.4 潜伏错误检测（每通过一个包应丢弃约 n−1 个、CurBaseDifference、LatentErrorReset、LatentErrorTest、SIGNAL_LATENT_ERROR）。7.5 单流恢复（单条成员流、克制卡死发送器、不含潜伏错误子功能）。7.6 序列编解码（写入/读取 sequence_number；除非流标识已编码它，否则需要它）。7.7 流拆分（通过流拆分表克隆包，每份拷贝有新的 stream_handle）。7.8 冗余标签：7.8.1 R-TAG 以太类型（F1-C1，表 7-1）；7.8.2 R-TAG 信息（16 位保留 + 16 位序列号）。7.9 HSR 序列标签（IEC 62439-3，PathId）。7.10 PRP 序列尾标（IEC 62439-3，LanId，附加于帧尾）。自动配置：7.11.1 引言（显式配置与经由序列/输出自动配置表的自动配置；仅适用于源 MAC 与 VLAN 标识 + MatchRecoveryAlgorithm）；7.11.2 创建自动配置的流标识表条目（匹配条件，以及构建 tsnStreamIdEntry、序列恢复、序列标识条目的级联过程，包括发现复合流的成员流和销毁定时器）。

Clause 8 — 网桥中的 FRER：8.1 限制选项（两个阶段——输入变换与增强转发——取代 Clause 7 的完全自由）。8.2 FRER C 组件输入变换（识别 → 序列生成 → R-TAG → 唯一 {VLAN, 目的 MAC}）。8.3 FRER 与 VLAN 标签（R-TAG 置于 C-VLAN 标签之后；示例帧格式）。8.4 在网桥中配置 FRER（FRER C 组件实现哪些 Clause 9/10 受管对象；表 8-1 的限制：内向生成/恢复、外向编码）。

Clause 9 — 流标识管理：9.1 流标识表；9.1.1 tsnStreamIdEntry（句柄、四个端口列表、标识类型、参数）；9.1.2 空流标识对象；9.1.3 源 MAC 与 VLAN 对象；9.1.4 主动目的 MAC 与 VLAN 对象（下行/上行的 MAC、VLAN、优先级、tagged）；9.1.5 IP 流标识对象（目的 MAC、IP 源/目的、DSCP、下一协议、源/目的端口）。9.2 逐端口逐流计数器：9.2.1 tsnCpsSidInputPackets、9.2.2 tsnCpsSidOutputPackets。9.3 逐端口计数器：9.3.1 tsnCpSidInputPackets、9.3.2 tsnCpSidOutputPackets（该端口上所有流之和）。

cites.note: Clause 7 (FRER functions: sequencing, recovery, latent-error detection, encode/decode, splitting, R-TAG/HSR/PRP, autoconfiguration), Clause 8 (FRER in Bridges), Clause 9 (Stream identity table and identification counters).
